issues: The draft describes this as an 'Abbott Cup playoff game' — the Abbott Cup is the Western Canadian junior-A final, not a playoff game between BC and Saskatchewan champions. The Abbott Cup series here is BC (Richmond) vs. Saskatchewan (Humboldt), which is actually the series leading into the Centennial Cup. This framing is slightly misleading but the core facts are correct.
The draft does not mention Matt Hervey, who is named in the OCR as scoring twice for Richmond — a notable Sockeyes player detail omitted from the description.

The headline 'Humboldt Broncos fall to Richmond Sockeyes in Abbott Cup series' is plausible but not confirmed as the actual headline — the OCR shows no distinct bold headline text, only the byline 'S-P Services' before the article body. The headline should be left empty or flagged.
Humboldt is described as 'Saskatchewan's amateur junior hockey league champions' in the OCR, not simply as a generic junior team — this nuance is missing from the long description.
review.correctedDescriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeated the Humboldt Broncos 5-3 to take a 3-2 series lead in their Abbott Cup best-of-seven, with Matt Hervey scoring twice for Richmond.
review.correctedDescriptionLong: The Richmond Sockeyes, BC junior-A champions, defeated the Humboldt Broncos 5-3 on Sunday to lead their Abbott Cup best-of-seven series 3-2, with both clubs set to participate in the Centennial Cup tournament beginning Saturday in Humboldt. Humboldt, Saskatchewan Amateur Junior Hockey League champions, led 2-0 after the first period before Richmond tied it 2-2 in the second frame. Matt Hervey scored twice for Richmond. Broncos coach Bernie Lynch criticized his team's play, saying "We haven't come close to reaching our potential in this series."
review.notes: No distinct headline is visible in the OCR — the article begins directly with the byline "S-P Services." The AI-drafted headline appears to be fabricated; it has been cleared. The OCR is truncated mid-sentence ("Matt Hervey scored twice for…") so additional game details may exist on a continuation of the article not captured in this scan.
